response.justification: Highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent (Ember), PostgreSQL-capable SQL background, and platform/integration experience that maps well to the role. However, this is a junior/mid-level entry-level position and the candidate is significantly overqualified, raising real risk of disengagement, salary mismatch, and short tenure. Berlin location aligns with on-site requirement. Worth a short screening call to gauge motivation for a junior role.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and full-stack experience across multiple platforms
Berlin-based, aligning with high on-site presence requirement
Relevant integration, CRM/data-source, and platform-building background
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level position (10+ years, Staff/Senior titles)
React experience not explicitly listed (Ember.js instead); limited recent PostgreSQL evidence (MongoDB-heavy)
Only basic German for a role likely tied to German construction/energy clients
